meaning: n.[动]火蜥蜴,火怪,耐火的人
examples: A salamander embryo can attract algae inside its tissues and cells.
The dusky salamander lives only in slow-moving streams where organic debris settles and accumulates.
They found that salamander regeneration begins when a clump of cells called blastema forms at the tip of a lost limb.
Here we have the big salamander monsters we saw in the gameplay footage yesterday.
Ms. HOLIDAY: (Singing) And that's the spot called Salamander Park...
